original_query: with sr_items as  (select i_item_id item_id,         sum(sr_return_quantity) sr_item_qty  from store_returns,       item,       date_dim  where sr_item_sk = i_item_sk  and   d_date    in 	(select d_date 	from date_dim 	where d_month_seq in 		(select d_month_seq 		from date_dim 	  where d_date in ('1999-03-22','1999-05-27','1999-08-04','1999-11-10')))  and   sr_returned_date_sk   = d_date_sk  and i_category IN ('Shoes', 'Women')  and i_manager_id BETWEEN 3 and 12  and sr_return_amt / sr_return_quantity between 264 and 293  and sr_reason_sk in (3, 4, 26, 40, 52) group by i_item_id),  cr_items as  (select i_item_id item_id,         sum(cr_return_quantity) cr_item_qty  from catalog_returns,       item,       date_dim  where cr_item_sk = i_item_sk  and   d_date    in 	(select d_date 	from date_dim   where d_month_seq in 		(select d_month_seq 		from date_dim 	  	  where d_date in ('1999-03-22','1999-05-27','1999-08-04','1999-11-10')))  and   cr_returned_date_sk   = d_date_sk  and i_category IN ('Shoes', 'Women')  and i_manager_id BETWEEN 3 and 12  and cr_return_amount / cr_return_quantity between 264 and 293  and cr_reason_sk in (3, 4, 26, 40, 52)  group by i_item_id),  wr_items as  (select i_item_id item_id,         sum(wr_return_quantity) wr_item_qty  from web_returns,       item,       date_dim  where wr_item_sk = i_item_sk  and   d_date    in 	(select d_date 	from date_dim   where d_month_seq in 		(select d_month_seq 		from date_dim 			  where d_date in ('1999-03-22','1999-05-27','1999-08-04','1999-11-10')))  and   wr_returned_date_sk   = d_date_sk  and i_category IN ('Shoes', 'Women')  and i_manager_id BETWEEN 3 and 12  and wr_return_amt / wr_return_quantity between 264 and 293  and wr_reason_sk in (3, 4, 26, 40, 52)  group by i_item_id)   select  sr_items.item_id        ,sr_item_qty        ,sr_item_qty/(sr_item_qty+cr_item_qty+wr_item_qty)/3.0 * 100 sr_dev        ,cr_item_qty        ,cr_item_qty/(sr_item_qty+cr_item_qty+wr_item_qty)/3.0 * 100 cr_dev        ,wr_item_qty        ,wr_item_qty/(sr_item_qty+cr_item_qty+wr_item_qty)/3.0 * 100 wr_dev        ,(sr_item_qty+cr_item_qty+wr_item_qty)/3.0 average  from sr_items      ,cr_items      ,wr_items  where sr_items.item_id=cr_items.item_id    and sr_items.item_id=wr_items.item_id  order by sr_items.item_id          ,sr_item_qty  limit 100;
rewritten_query:
WITH date_filter AS (
    SELECT d_date_sk
    FROM date_dim
    WHERE d_date IN ('1999-03-22','1999-05-27','1999-08-04','1999-11-10')
), 
filtered_items AS (
    SELECT i_item_sk, i_item_id
    FROM item
    WHERE i_category IN ('Shoes', 'Women') 
    AND i_manager_id BETWEEN 3 AND 12
),
sr_items AS (
    SELECT 
        i_item_id AS item_id,
        SUM(sr_return_quantity) AS sr_item_qty
    FROM store_returns
    JOIN filtered_items ON sr_item_sk = i_item_sk
    JOIN date_filter ON sr_returned_date_sk = d_date_sk
    WHERE sr_return_amt BETWEEN 264 * sr_return_quantity AND 293 * sr_return_quantity
        AND sr_reason_sk IN (3, 4, 26, 40, 52)
    GROUP BY i_item_id
), 
cr_items AS (
    SELECT 
        i_item_id AS item_id,
        SUM(cr_return_quantity) AS cr_item_qty
    FROM catalog_returns
    JOIN filtered_items ON cr_item_sk = i_item_sk
    JOIN date_filter ON cr_returned_date_sk = d_date_sk
    WHERE cr_return_amount BETWEEN 264 * cr_return_quantity AND 293 * cr_return_quantity
        AND cr_reason_sk IN (3, 4, 26, 40, 52)
    GROUP BY i_item_id
), 
wr_items AS (
    SELECT 
        i_item_id AS item_id,
        SUM(wr_return_quantity) AS wr_item_qty
    FROM web_returns
    JOIN filtered_items ON wr_item_sk = i_item_sk
    JOIN date_filter ON wr_returned_date_sk = d_date_sk
    WHERE wr_return_amt BETWEEN 264 * wr_return_quantity AND 293 * wr_return_quantity
        AND wr_reason_sk IN (3, 4, 26, 40, 52)
    GROUP BY i_item_id
)
SELECT 
    sr.item_id,
    sr.sr_item_qty,
    (sr.sr_item_qty / (sr.sr_item_qty + cr.cr_item_qty + wr.wr_item_qty) / 3.0) * 100 AS sr_dev,
    cr.cr_item_qty,
    (cr.cr_item_qty / (sr.sr_item_qty + cr.cr_item_qty + wr.wr_item_qty) / 3.0) * 100 AS cr_dev,
    wr.wr_item_qty,
    (wr.wr_item_qty / (sr.sr_item_qty + cr.cr_item_qty + wr.wr_item_qty) / 3.0) * 100 AS wr_dev,
    (sr.sr_item_qty + cr.cr_item_qty + wr.wr_item_qty) / 3.0 AS average
FROM sr_items sr
JOIN cr_items cr ON sr.item_id = cr.item_id
JOIN wr_items wr ON sr.item_id = wr.item_id
ORDER BY sr.item_id, sr.sr_item_qty
LIMIT 100;

rewrite_suggestion.nave_suggestion: Created a common date_filter CTE to replace nested subqueries for date filtering, reducing redundant processing across the three main CTEs.
Replaced division operations in WHERE clauses with multiplication to avoid expensive division operations and potential division by zero issues.
Simplified the join structure by using explicit JOIN syntax instead of comma-separated joins, making the query more readable and potentially more efficient.
